plugins.name: stackiq-plugin
plugins.description: StackIQ: weekly AI/SaaS utilization diagnostic. A 5-stage read-then-act pipeline that audits tool spend and adoption, sizes findings in dollars/seats/accounts, ships an Excel workbook + CEO deck, then executes approved remediations behind a hard human-approval gate. Name specific tools, or ask for a full-stack audit and StackIQ will discover the rest.
